message:
✨ Multiple UI improvements and fixes

- Add AI mission creation from navbar search with keyboard nav
- Fix agent dropdown caching to prevent empty state on reconnect
- Add XPU/AIU/TPU support to StatsOverview and StatsConfig
- Add anchor IDs to all Settings sections for deep linking
- Improve Settings navigation with visual feedback
- Enhance llm-d Stack Monitor with WVA/HPA status display
- Fix stack dropdown rendering and caching issues
- Add Netlify Functions config for user count feature
- Improve WidgetSettingsSection with search and sort controls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@
   command = "npm ci && npm run build"
   publish = "dist"
 
+[functions]
+  # Netlify Functions directory (relative to base)
+  directory = "netlify/functions"
+  node_bundler = "esbuild"
+
 [build.environment]
   # Enable demo mode with mock data for Netlify previews
   VITE_DEMO_MODE = "true"
